name: scaffold-task-builder
description: A zero-dependency visual editor for building `.task` files used by the scaffold engine. No build step, no `node_modules` — just HTML, CSS, and vanilla JavaScript with ES modules.

scripts.test:e2e: npx serve -l 8275 --no-clipboard & sleep 2 && npx cypress run; kill %1 2>/dev/null
scripts.test:unit: npx serve -l 8275 --no-clipboard & sleep 2 && npx cypress run --spec 'cypress/e2e/unit/**/*.cy.js'; kill %1 2>/dev/null
